name: Rainmaker Worldwide Inc.
business: The Company specializes in energy-efficient freshwater production and purification technologies, primarily through Air-to-Water (AW) systems that extract water from humidity. It also offers solutions to transform contaminated or seawater into potable or reusable water. The Company is focused on business development across North, South, and Central America, as well as the Caribbean.

exposures.sentence: The Company specializes in energy-efficient freshwater production and purification technologies, primarily through Air-to-Water (AW) systems that extract water from humidity.
AW is both a cost-effective technology solution and can be powered by solar, wind, or grid electricity, or a combination of power sources.

catalysts.sentence: On January 22, 2024, RWI finalized the acquisition of Miranda.

catalysts.event: Restructuring of RWI and reduction of ownership to 13.65%
catalysts.sentence: On December 31, 2024, RWI underwent a restructuring, during which the Company converted its investment in RWI into RWI shares.

catalysts.event: Payment of remaining $2 million for Miranda acquisition
catalysts.sentence: The remaining two million USD is to be paid no later than 2 years from the closing date of January 22 nd , 2024.

tamClaims.claim: Annual global water market is $880 billion in 2023, expected to expand to $1.2 trillion by 2031
tamClaims.sentence: Today, the annual global water market for all purposes and uses is $880 billion in 2023 and is expected to expand to $1.2 trillion by 2031 (Source: Verified Market Research: www.verifiedmarketresearch.com).

tamClaims.claim: RAKR's solutions are tailored to meet roughly 70% of that global level of demand
tamClaims.sentence: Applying RAKR’s approach against the purposes and uses defined above, our solutions are tailored to meet roughly 70% of that global level of demand.
